channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ella Blackamore’s endometriosis journey highlights delayed diagnosis and medical dismissal of severe period pain
item.description: Ella Blackamore’s experience with endometriosis highlights the significant challenges many women face in receiving timely diagnosis and appropriate care for chronic pelvic pain conditions. She began m...

item.title: US–Iran ceasefire talks progress as Trump signals possible strikes amid West Asia tensions
item.description: The live updates report escalating but simultaneously evolving diplomatic and military developments in the ongoing West Asia conflict involving Iran, Israel, and the United States. According to the la...

item.title: FBI launches national fitness competition to identify its most physically capable agents
item.description: The FBI has announced a new national initiative aimed at identifying the most physically fit male and female agents across its 56 field offices. According to reports, the programme will culminate in a...

item.title: PRP Clears Donald Duke and Two Others for Presidential Primary Contest
item.description: The Peoples Redemption Party (PRP) has officially cleared three aspirants to contest for its presidential primary ahead of the party’s upcoming election. The approved candidates include Dr. Nnaoke Ufe...

item.title: Papa Penny explains resignation from MK Party and joins Floyd Shivambu’s movement
item.description: Gezane “Papa Penny” Kobane, a veteran South African musician and former Member of Parliament for the MK Party, has publicly explained the reasons behind his resignation from the party. Speaking in an ...

item.title: Toronto police investigate armed robbery involving over $1 million in stolen jewellery and four suspects
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a violent armed robbery involving jewellery valued at more than $1 million and are seeking four suspects in connection with the incident. According to investigators, t...

item.title: Early Behind-the-Scenes Photos of Audrey Hepburn in Monte Carlo (1951) and Her Path to Roman Holiday
item.description: The article recounts a behind-the-scenes story from 1951 involving photographer Edward Quinn and a young, then-unknown Audrey Hepburn during the production of the film ‘Monte Carlo Baby.’ Quinn descri...

item.title: Cayetano Defends Duterte’s Anti-Drug Campaign as a Measure to Protect Communities
item.description: Senator Alan Peter Cayetano defended former President Rodrigo Duterte’s controversial war on drugs, describing it as a “pro-life campaign” aimed at protecting ordinary Filipinos from the harmful effec...

item.title: National Assembly considers bill to legalise cannabis for medical and economic use in Nigeria
item.description: Nigeria’s National Assembly is currently considering a proposed bill that could legalise cannabis for medicinal, industrial, and economic purposes under a strict regulatory framework. The development ...

item.title: US signals progress on Iran peace deal amid ongoing mediation efforts
item.description: US President Donald Trump has indicated that a peace agreement with Iran is close to completion, suggesting that negotiations have been largely finalised. In a post on Truth Social, Trump described th...

item.title: Early Photos Highlight Diane Keaton’s Rise and Distinctive Style in 1960s New York
item.description: The article looks back at actress Diane Keaton’s early years in New York City during the late 1960s, before she became one of Hollywood’s most recognizable performers. Born Diane Hall in 1946, Keaton ...

item.title: Eviction dispute triggers tension and protests at Dalit settlement in Malayidamthuruth
item.description: A tense atmosphere prevailed at Pariyathukavu, a Dalit settlement in Malayidamthuruth near Kizhakkambalam in Kerala, amid renewed fears of eviction of seven families based on a court order. The reside...

item.title: Ellie Goulding debuts new single ‘Black Prada Dress’ live at Radio 1’s Big Weekend
item.description: Ellie Goulding has premiered a new song titled ‘Black Prada Dress’ during her performance at BBC Radio 1’s Big Weekend, held at Herrington Country Park in Sunderland. The appearance marks the live deb...

item.title: Orlando Pirates Win PSL Title to End Mamelodi Sundowns’ Eight-Year Reign
item.description: Orlando Pirates wamefanikiwa kutwaa ubingwa wa Premier Soccer League ya Afrika Kusini na kumaliza utawala wa miaka nane mfululizo wa Mamelodi Sundowns katika soka la nchini humo. Ushindi huo unaashiri...

item.title: Orlando Pirates win Betway Premiership title after defeating Orbit College 2-0
item.description: Orlando Pirates secured the 2025/26 Betway Premiership title after a dramatic 2-0 victory over Orbit College at Mbombela Stadium on Saturday. The result ended Pirates’ 14-year wait for a league champi...

item.title: Pope Leo criticises high profits of polluting companies, calls for environmental responsibility
item.description: Pope Leo has strongly criticised companies that continue to generate what he described as “dizzying” profits while contributing significantly to environmental pollution. Speaking in a recent address r...

item.title: Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette defends campaign spending promises despite budget concerns
item.description: Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette defended her recent spending commitments after concerns emerged from Finance Minister Eric Girard that her promises could exceed the province’s allocated political s...

item.title: Senate President Cayetano Leaves Leadership Fate to Divine Will Amid Political Rumors
item.description: Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano has responded calmly to ongoing rumors of another possible leadership change in the Philippine Senate. In a recent statement, he mentioned that his continued role ...

item.title: NASCAR champion Kyle Busch dies at 41 after complications from pneumonia and sepsis
item.description: Two-time NASCAR Cup Series champion Kyle Busch died at the age of 41 after suffering severe pneumonia that progressed into sepsis, according to a statement released by his family on Saturday. The fami...

item.title: Orlando Pirates crowned 2026 Betway Premiership champions after strong finish under Ouaddou
item.description: Orlando Pirates have been crowned 2026 Betway Premiership champions after a season that highlighted patience, resilience, and steady improvement under coach Abdeslam Ouaddou. The Buccaneers endured a ...
